sections.paragraph:
διαϰρίνω [διά, κρίνω]

—1. distinguish, of ethnic/class distinction Ac 11:12; 15:9; 1 Cor 4:7 who sets you apart (from others)?; Js 2:4.

—2. of decision making

—a. evaluate, read (in the sense of careful discernment) Mt 16:3; 1 Cor 11:29, 31.

—b. judge 1 Cor 14:29 pass judgment. —Legal t.t. 6:5 reach a decision.

—3. dispute, contend (with) Ac 11:2; Jd 9.

—4. of intellectual weighing of matters that leads to wavering or hesitation, esp. within a belief system doubt Mt 21:21; Mk 11:23; Ac 10:20; Ro 4:20; 14:23; Js 1:6; Jd 22.
